top_signals.title: New Zealand Inflation Accelerates to 4.1% on Soaring Fuel Costs
top_signals.summary: New Zealand’s annual inflation accelerated to the highest level in more than two years in the second quarter, fanned by soaring fuel prices and reinforcing the Reserve Bank’s decision to begin raising interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
